title: Downhole detection
abstract: There is disclosed an apparatus (115) for detecting and/or measuring a downhole feature(195),such as a fluid/fluid interface,in a well (105). The apparatus (115) comprises a first fluid and/or liquid permeable tube (120). The first tube (120) is porous or(micro)perforated. The apparatus (115) comprises a second fluid and/or liquid impermeable tube (130). The first and second tubes (110, 130) are hollow,and therefore,provide first and second waveguides, respectively.
claims:
Claims 1. An apparatus or system for detecting and/or measuring a downhole feature in a well, such as a sealed well, the apparatus comprising a or at least one first, fluid and/or liquid permeable, tube or tubing. 2. An apparatus or system as claimed in claim 1 , wherein: the well is an oil, gas and/or water well, and/or the well is a production, injection/artificial lift, completed/sealed/pressurised, observation injection, and/or disposal well. 3. An apparatus or system as claimed in either of claims 1 or 2, wherein: the first tube is porous or perforated: and/or the first tube comprises an at least partially porous or perforated wall or side wall, for example, comprising a plurality of pores, micropores, holes or slots. 4. An apparatus or system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the first tube comprises a polymeric or plastics material or a metallic material. 5. An apparatus or system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the apparatus or system further comprises a or at least one second, fluid and/or liquid impermeable, tube or tubing, for example, comprising a solid, non-porous and/or non-perforated side wall. 6. An apparatus or system as claimed in claim 5, wherein the second tube comprises a polymeric or plastics material or a metallic material. 7. An apparatus or system as claimed in either of claims 5 or 6, wherein an end, such as an upper or downstream end, of a/the first tube is (fluidically and/or transmittably) attached to or connected to an end, such as a lower or upstream end, of a/the second tube. 8. An apparatus or system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the/each first tube and/or the/each second tube is/are hollow, the/each first tube and/or second tube optionally providing respective first and second waveguides. 9. An apparatus or system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein: 

 a/the first tube and/or a/the second tube are reelable or spoolable, for example, comprising coiled tubing. 10. An apparatus or system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein: the first tube and a/the (respective) second tube are (fluidically) connected via a connector; and/or the apparatus or system comprise a plurality of first tubes and respective second tubes, and in such case optionally each first tube is adapted such that a downhole end thereof is at a different level or depth to a downhole end of the/each other first tube, and/or the first tubes and second tubes is/are provided within an outer sheath or conduit. 11. An apparatus or system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein: the/each first tube comprises a first waveguide; a/the/each second tube comprises a second waveguide; and/or a/the/each connector comprises a further waveguide. 12. An apparatus or system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein: the/each first tube has a substantially circular cross-section, for example, at least internal cross-section; and/or a/the/each second tube has a substantially circular cross-section, for example, at least internal cross-section. 13. An apparatus or system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein: the first tube is provided downhole of a/the (respective) second tube; a/the second tube extends substantially from or through a wellhead or Christmas tree; the apparatus is provided in a wellbore of the well, such as in a annulus between a wellbore casing and production tubing; an electromagnetic signal, such as a microwave signal, is propagated within a/the second tube to within the first tube such as via a/the connector; and/or a partial reflection of the electromagnetic signal occurs at a/the connector or joint between the first tube and second tubes, for example, so as to provide a reference level or datum point. 14 An apparatus or system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the 

 apparatus or system further provides an electromagnetic antenna, such as a microwave, millimetre or radio antenna, which is connected to another or upstream end of the second tube, and wherein the electromagnetic antenna comprises a transmitter; the electromagnetic comprises a receiver; and/or the electromagnetic antenna is provided external of the wellhead and/or Christmas tree. 15. An apparatus or system as claimed in claim 14, wherein, in use, in a transmission path, an electromagnetic signal propagates from the transmitter through a/the second tube, the second tube extends through the wellhead and/or the Christmas tree, in said transmission path, the electromagnetic signal propagates through the connector, in said transmission path the electromagnetic signal propagates through the first tube, for example, until a fluid/fluid interface(s), such as fluid/liquid interface, is met, at said fluid/fluid interface the electromagnetic signal is at least partially reflected, the reflected electromagnetic signal then propagates through the first tube, the connector, and/or the second tube in a received, return, and/or reverse path, the reflected signal being received by the receiver. 16. An apparatus or system as claimed in claim 15, wherein: the electromagnetic signal comprises a microwave signal, a millimetre or radio signal; and/or the electromagnetic signal has a frequency or frequencies within a range of 1 MHz to 100MHz, IMHz to 1GHz, IGHz to 100GHz, e.g. IGHz to 50GHz, e.g. 4GHz to 40GHz or 20GHz to 70GHz; and/or the electromagnetic signal comprises a TE-nn, TEnn mode or other mode, such as TEMnn, to suit the specific measurement requirement. 17. A well, such as an oil/gas/water/disposal well, comprising an apparatus or system for detecting and/or measuring a downhole feature in a well as claimed any of claims 1 to 16. 18. A well as claimed in claim 17, wherein the well comprises: a completed/sealed/pressurised well; a wellbore casing a production tubing; a wellhead; 

 a Christmas tree; and/or the apparatus or system extends within the well, such as in an annulus between the wellbore casing and the production tubing. 19. A well as claimed in either of claims 17 or 18, wherein: the second tube extends through the wellhead/Christmas tree, such as through a port in the Christmas tree; and/or the second tube acts as a second production or injection conduit. 20. A tube or tubing adapted to comprise a first tube or tubing of the apparatus or system of any of claims 1 to 16. 21. A tube or tubing adapted to comprise a second tube or tubing of the apparatus or system of any of claims 1 to 16. 22. A method of detecting and/or measuring at least one downhole feature in a well, such as a oil/gas/water well, the method comprises: providing an apparatus or system according to any of claims 1 to 16 within a wellbore of the well; transmitting, for example, from a transmitter, an electromagnetic signal within (down) the apparatus or system; reflecting at least part of the electromagnetic signal from the feature (interface); receiving the at least part of the electromagnetic signal, for example, at a receiver. 23. A method as claimed in claim 22, wherein the transmitter and the receiver are provided external of the wellbore. 24. A method as claimed in either of claims 22 or 23, wherein the downhole feature comprises a fluid/fluid interface, such as a gas/liquid, liquid/liquid interface. 25. A method as claimed in any of claims 22 to 24, wherein the method comprises the step of sealing the well, for example, prior to the step of transmitting the electromagnetic signal.
